designSystem.name: Tala Editorial Operations
designSystem.summary: Mobile-first editorial operations console for a local issue tracker, using warm paper surfaces, charcoal primary actions, indigo planning accents, green resolved states, and vermilion blocker/error signals.

screens.title: Tala Filter Drawer
screens.purpose: Assignee, priority, tag, status, and text filtering

screens.title: Tala Create Issue
screens.purpose: Create issue form with required title validation

screens.title: Tala Issue Detail
screens.purpose: Issue overview with metadata, Markdown, relationships, and comments

screens.title: Tala Edit Description
screens.purpose: Markdown source editing and sanitized preview

screens.title: Tala Manage Relationships
screens.purpose: Set parent and add/remove blockers with cycle error state

screens.title: Tala Blocker Planning
screens.purpose: Mobile dependency and blocked-by planning view

screens.title: Tala Triage Board (Empty)
screens.purpose: First-run board state with no issues
